name: IBEX Ltd
business: ibex delivers innovative business process outsourcing (BPO), smart digital marketing, online acquisition technology, and end-to-end customer engagement solutions. It helps companies acquire, engage, and retain valuable customers. The company serves over 140 clients across various verticals.

exposures.sentence: These brands span across Retail & E-commerce, HealthTech, Telecommunication, FinTech, Travel, Transportation & Logistics, and Technology verticals.

catalysts.event: Building additional capacity in offshore regions
catalysts.sentence: As demand for delivery locations has continued to shift towards lower cost geographies during the fiscal year ended June 30, 2025, we have filled up existing capacity and are in the process of building additional capacity in our offshore regions.
